cost_components_summary: No separate non-commodity residual cost is calibrated. Commodity inputs and carbon costs are priced by normal solver semantics.
input_basis_notes: Residual manufacturing energy inputs are allocated from the former manufacturing residual to explicit chemical and other material product roles.
emissions_boundary_notes: Includes allocated direct energy CO2e and allocated non-energy process CO2e. Electricity-related emissions are excluded from residual end-use coefficients and flow through electricity supply.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the role method.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse calibration placeholder until explicit roles are authored.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated manufacturing and IPPU residual calibration layer and official Australian energy and inventory closure totals.
derivation_method: Mechanical equal split of former residual manufacturing energy inputs and residual IPPU process emissions into explicit material transformation roles with demand anchor 1.0.
review_notes: Residual stub for closure and scenario accounting, not an optimisable technology representation.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Replace with subsector-specific chemicals petrochemicals and materials process chains when source data support them.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to fixed calibration demand processes with explicit commodity inputs and direct process emissions.
